the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of 
the Part D benefit. One month supply. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a coinsurance percentage rather than a co-payment amount will not have a value in this 
field; reference instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (PRE_ICL_OONP_COINS_1M). 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System
